## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, upcoming projects, and align on priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift towards a mix of in-depth informational content (\~3k words) and shorter thought leadership pieces (500-1000 words)](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Planning a focused "AI for Web Management" learn track/guide series for August/September](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Incorporating client insights and industry trends to inform content ideation and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Aim for 2-3 shorter thought leadership pieces (500-1000 words) and 6-7 in-depth informational guides per week](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Focus on depth and quality over strict word count limits](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Utilize a mix of AI for web dev topics and AEO/GEO content based on provided documents and client insights](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

### Upcoming "AI for Web Management" Learn Track

  - [Plan a 3-week period (likely August) to create a comprehensive guide on AI in web management](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Cover topics like GEO/SEO, content generation, web development, design, and team workflows](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Structure as interconnected blog posts, similar to previous web design guide](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Aim to launch in September (Q3)](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Content Ideation Sources

  - [Leverage shared Gong call recordings for client insights on priority topics](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Use internal documents on AEO/GEO and AI in web development as foundational material](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Incorporate insights from CMOs, VPs of marketing, and heads of web strategy](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

### Website Optimization

  - [Address competing slide-ins and CTAs on the website](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [Plan for future deep dive on conversions, CTAs, and experimentation strategy](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Consider personalization options while balancing with other priorities](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review shared Gong call recordings for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Develop questions for thought leadership interviews](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Create content ideation and strategy map for August through September](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
  - [Prepare for discovery/planning call next week with Webstacks web strategist](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=2343.0)
  - [Begin outlining structure for "AI for Web Management" learn track](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
  - [Address website CTA and slide-in inconsistencies](https://fathom.video/share/r7UxXjL3yJhNjMHVaTxTkT4qNxXcpddt?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
